patterns: append-only write for add command — O(1) file I/O using 'a' mode
try/except FileNotFoundError for file-missing handling — cleaner than os.path.exists
silent ignore pattern for invalid input — non-integer IDs and missing args return without error
enumerate(lines, start=1) for 1-based indexing — clean ID generation
architecturalNotes: Simple flat-file storage with line-per-task approach works well for small-scale CLI tools
Append mode for add is more efficient than full read-write cycle

atus.title: Complete todo.py implementation (add, list, remove)
atus.description: Implement all three CLI commands in todo.py: add (append task to file), list (display with 1-based IDs), remove (delete by ID with edge case handling). Tests already exist in tests/test_todo.py.

samples.name: sample1
samples.strategy: Append-only write — add uses 'a' mode, list/remove use readlines, try/except for FileNotFoundError

samples.name: sample2
samples.strategy: Full-load-full-save — uses load_todos/save_todos helpers, command routing via separate functions

retainedTraits: append-only write for add command — O(1) file I/O using 'a' mode
try/except FileNotFoundError for file-missing handling — cleaner than os.path.exists
silent ignore pattern for invalid input — non-integer IDs and missing args return without error
enumerate(lines, start=1) for 1-based indexing — clean ID generation

events.description: TDD 测试先行 — 测试文件 tests/test_todo.py 已存在，验证测试可独立运行
委派 Developer 生成 sample1 和 sample2 变体。Sample1: 逐行追加写入策略；Sample2: 全量读写策略 + 函数拆分
sample1: 4/4 通过, sample2: 4/4 通过。两个样本均完全通过，选择 sample1 作为最优（逐行追加写入策略更简洁高效）
提取性状：1) append-only write for add（O(1)操作）, 2) try/except FileNotFoundError 处理文件缺失, 3) 静默忽略无效输入模式, 4) enumerate(start=1) 生成1-based ID
第 1 代进化成功，两个样本均完全通过 4/4 测试，ATU-001 完成
ATU-001 通过第 1 代进化完成
